events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario. Task: identify component or condition and visible defect cues. Scenario: commercial construction, flashing & WRB integration, Carpentry & Finishes, observed field condition: tape sequence wrong at sill. Work rough-complete. Reference IRC R703, mfr instructions. Need decision fail because non-compliant. Risk? Tape sequence wrong at sill can lead to water intrusion, high? For commercial WRB integration, improper tape sequence at sill compromises drainage plane and flashing, risk high. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80? value 0. confidence high 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings: WRB tape applied in incorrect sequence at window/door sill, lapping orientation reversed/incorrect relative to flashing; tape not shingled properly; potential for water intrusion. actions: remove and reinstall WRB tape in proper sequence per manufacturer and IRC R703, ensure sill flashing is lapped correctly and drainage plane maintained, inspect adjacent WRB integration. rationale: At rough-complete, WRB and flashing integration must be installed per code and manufacturer instructions; wrong tape sequence at sill defeats water-resistive barrier and flashing, creating a defect/non-compliance. references: IRC R703.1/.2 weather protection, R703.2 flashing, manufacturer installation instructions. Need ensure JSON valid.
